## Before Requesting Initial Review
- [ ] No duplicated code — checked that similar functionality doesn't already exist in the project.
- [ ] No linter violations or warnings.
- [ ] Pipelines run through successfully.
- [ ] No files changed accidentally.
- [ ] Main is up-merged and the PR is up-to-date.
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards.
- [ ] I have updated any relevant documentation (if applicable).

- [ ] No files changed accidentally.
- [ ] Main is up-merged and the PR is up-to-date.
